case_title: LUIS M. LEGARREA et al VS. STEWART TITLE GUARANTY CO.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-23-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STEWART TITLE GUARANTY CO.
